required_actions.description: Create governance/repo_config.yaml declaring repo_id, repo_type, owners, and fleet-policy alignment. Required before structure audit can resolve the repo type.
Author or repair .giles/repo.yaml to conform to the v2.2 RepoManifest schema (repo_id, canon_version, mode).
Choose the manifest `mode` value (canonical / extended / translated-compatible / declared-divergent) based on this repo's compliance posture.
Add `repo_standard.version: "1.0"` to governance/repo_manifest.yaml so Giles considers this repo governed under the v6 standard.
Align AGENTS contract to fleet standard and document repo-specific exceptions in a canonical governance lane.
Align repository semantic slots and control-layer structure expectations; record explicit exceptions.
Document public CLI/API/UI surfaces and required outputs in discoverable operator-facing documentation.
After applying the above actions, re-run `giles compliance-todo --refresh <repo>` to refresh this artifact and confirm the recheck status.
